The Ultimate Partner for Meetings & Interviews

Architecture Guide
View on GitHub

Phantom Invisibility

Advanced Anti-Capture technology makes VNNotes non-existent to Zoom, Teams, OBS, and Discord.

Teleprompter

Float transparent prompts and scripts over any application to maintain perfect eye contact.

Zero-Cloud Security

A military-grade local storage philosophy ensuring your meeting notes stay exclusively on your machine.
